sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40687" key="e)pipursei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπυρσεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40687.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">counter-signal by fires</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:6:19:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.19.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
